name: @koad-io/node
description: Core koad object and shared crypto/IPFS dependencies — standalone Node.js module. The Meteor package koad:io-core imports from here; CLI tools and the daemon can too.

scripts.build:browser: browserify -i sodium -s kbpgp ./browser/kbpgp-with-internals.js -o ./browser/kbpgp.bundle.js && npx uglify-js ./browser/kbpgp.bundle.js -o ./browser/kbpgp.bundle.min.js --compress --mangle && echo 'Bundle built. Copy to forge/websites/kingofalldata.com/src/public/ manually or via sync script.'
